parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: Configures the default element, custom rendering, props, state, and refs.

returns.description: The default element or the custom element returned by the render prop.

properties.name: defaultTagName
properties.description: The element rendered when render is not provided.

properties.name: render
properties.description: A React element or function used to replace the default element.

properties.name: props
properties.description: Props applied to the rendered element.

properties.name: state
properties.description: State passed to the render function. Required when State defines properties.

properties.name: ref
properties.description: An additional ref applied to the rendered HTML element.

properties.name: render
properties.description: Adds a type-safe render prop to the default element's props.
